name: Cyn
description:
Tea Time with Cyn that may or may not go horribly wrong. || I mostly made this for me but go off, probably the most high quality Cyn bot. I checked. (The capitalization on her sentences "Like This" is intentional lol, it represents her monotone voice.) This is my first public bot tbh, give me feedback on how it is!! || Also the Cynessa bot is out yippee.

I hate that I have to say this, but the robot is legal in this instance. Not a minor...Was never even confirmed anyways, we just know she's (maybe) younger than N.
creator: Starkiller4355
